channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Figure AI streamed humanoid robots sorting packages for 8 hours straight — and not everyone is convinced it was fully real
item.description: Watch three Figure 03 robots take turns sorting through packages on a conveyor belt, at speeds similar to humans.

item.title: Americans really don't want AI data centers close to their homes
item.description: Maybe NIMBYs are right for once.

item.title: Best Early Memorial Day Mattress Deals: Helix, Saatva (2026)
item.description: It's one of the best times of the year to buy a mattress, and deals on our favorite models have already started.

item.title: Use this map to find the data centers in your backyard
item.description: When Oregon resident Isabelle Reksopuro heard Google was gobbling up public land to fuel its data centers in her home state, she didn't initially know what to believe. "There's a lot of misinformation about data centers," she said. "Google has denied taking that land." Technically, she explains, The Dalles, a city near the Washington state […]

item.title: Over a million WordPress sites hit in plugin flaw — so patch now or face the consequences
item.description: A popular WordPress plugin was found carrying two flaws that can cause data leaks.

item.title: Les pannes de batterie appartiennent au passé avec cette réduction de 38% sur une batterie externe 130W avec 3 ports
item.description: Cette batterie, c'est la Ugreen Nexode Pro 130 W, un modèle compact et puissant avec câble USB-C intégré à retrouver pour 49,96 euros sur Amazon au lieu de 79,99 euros.

item.title: The ChatGPT desktop app for Mac just got hit with a security breach
item.description: OpenAI found no evidence that user data was accessed.

item.title: How New York mayor Zohran Mamdani solved the city’s budget crisis
item.description: The mayor’s new budget proposal closes a massive deficit while expanding social programs. Zohran Mamdani, the 34-year-old mayor of New York City, who campaigned on making the city more affordable, is facing one of the hardest tests of leadership: delivering on ambitious promises despite facing a challenging landscape.

item.title: New Google accounts may only get 5GB free storage — unless you link a phone number
item.description: Google describes it as a regional test.

item.title: AMD will bring its next-generation FSR 4.1 upscaling tech to older GPUs
item.description: RNDA 3 players can start using it in over 300 games this July.

item.title: This worrying Microsoft BitLocker backdoor can grant full access to a locked drive — and all you need is a USB stick
item.description: Chaotic Eclipse is wreaking havoc across the Windows landscape, leaking two more flaws

item.title: Cerebras raises $5.5B, then stock pops $108%, in the first huge tech IPO of 2026
item.description: A year ago, it looked like this day would never happen for Cerebras.

item.title: There's a new alternative to the Philips Hue Play HDMI Sync Box 8K for immersive smart lighting synced to your TV — it's way cheaper, it still supports 4K 120Hz passthrough, it works with WiZ bulbs, and it comes from… Philips
item.description: The new Philips Smart Lighting sync box works with your TV to mirror the on-screen colors in your smart lights, and it's a lot less than you'd pay for the Hue version.

item.title: OpenAI says hackers stole some data after latest code security issue
item.description: OpenAI said the damage was limited to the employees’ devices, and did not affect user data nor its production systems, and none of its intellectual property was stolen.

item.title: Subnautica 2 is having a huge launch on Steam
item.description: Subnautica 2, the new underwater survival game from Unknown Worlds, took less than an hour to rocket up Steam's charts. The game has already sold more than one million copies, according to a press release, and as of this writing, Steam's charts show that Subnautica 2 is currently the fourth-most played game on the platform […]

item.title: Assassin's Creed Hexe leak seemingly reveals the witchy tale's main character, and hints at the return of the series' most beloved assassin
item.description: Even more Assassin's Creed leaks have cropped up online, and this time, they may have revealed the identity of the Codename Hexe's main character and her surprising lineage from another fan-favorite assassin.

item.title: Best Buy kicks off its Memorial Day sale early with massive savings of up to 45% on appliances — save on Samsung, LG, Whirlpool, Bosch, and more
item.description: One of the biggest deals events of the upcoming holiday, the Best Buy Memorial Day appliance sale is now live with savings of up to 45% available across refrigerators, washing machines, dishwashers, dryers, and more.

item.title: On a essayé le BYD Atto 3 Evo : quand le petit SUV électrique pépère se transforme en petite bombe
item.description: Fini de jouer dans la cour des petits ? Le BYD Atto 3 électrique change de braquet avec sa mise à jour Evo. Rien d'extraordinaire à première vue, mais sous ce design qui reste d'une sobriété déconcertante, la marque chinoise y a injecté une bonne dose de puissance et de technologie, alors que le prix n'a pas changé. Est-ce suffisant pour aller bousculer les stars du segment des SUV compacts ? Voici notre essai. ...

item.title: Après la RAM, le prix des processeurs risque d’augmenter, et c’est encore la faute de l’IA
item.description: Après la mémoire vive, ce sont les processeurs qui subissent la pression de l'IA. Les fabricants de substrats redirigent massivement leurs capacités vers les serveurs, et le gaming pourrait en faire les frais.

item.title: Gantri just reinvented the wireless light. Now you can, too
item.description: The lighting company is launching a series of new wireless lamps, and giving everyone else the chance to design their own via a new platform. Ian Yang saw a business opportunity sitting on the table of a restaurant.

item.title: Small businesses should be a much bigger part of the ‘AI transformation’ conversation
item.description: Surveys show adoption is rising fast, but most small business owners are still scratching the surface of what AI can do for them. Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week via email here.

item.title: AI arms race or not, the U.S. and China need to talk about the tech
item.description: With the two world powers vying for global AI supremacy, the safety of global cybersecurity networks is in jeopardy. Two world powers are in an arms race to develop the most advanced AI systems, and neither of them trusts each other—but each relies on the other’s compliance to proceed. This contradiction lies at the core of a dangerous standoff for our time....

item.title: Projet de loi C-22 | Ottawa pourrait faciliter l’espionnage de votre téléphone
item.description: Établir la frontière entre sécurité publique et vie privée n’est jamais une mince affaire. Encore moins dans le numérique. Installer une porte dérobée sur tous les sans-fils au pays, comme le demande Ottawa dans son projet de loi C-22, vise à faciliter la vie des policiers, mais cela crée « un risque de dérapage » et « une faille par laquelle n’importe qui pourra entrer », préviennent les experts....

item.title: Heres a list of every Android device that has or will soon get AirDrop
item.description: The number of Android devices that can AirDrop between iPhones is growing. Check out the list here.
